summary: Frontend UI testing for Leaderboards and Classroom Management (Phase 3). Classes page, Class Detail page, and Create/Add dialogs all working. 5 of 6 features pass. Leaderboard component exists but is not yet integrated into any page.

integration_issues.issue: Leaderboard.jsx component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/game/Leaderboard.jsx but is not imported/rendered in any page yet

1_classes_page.details: /dashboard/classes loads with classes list, 'New Class' button visible (data-testid='new-class-btn'), class cards show with join codes (data-testid='class-card-{id}')

2_create_class_dialog.details: Create class dialog opens with form fields (Class Name, Description, Grade Level, Subject). Form submission creates class successfully with toast notification. data-testid='class-name-input' and 'create-class-btn' working.

3_class_detail_page.details: /dashboard/classes/:classId loads with class info, students table (with columns: Student, Games, Score, Accuracy, Last Active), join code button, tabs (Students/Settings). data-testid='class-detail-page' visible.

4_add_student_dialog.details: Add Student dialog opens from 'Add Student' button (data-testid='add-student-dialog-btn'). Form with Student Name (required), Email (optional), Student ID (optional). Successfully adds student with toast. data-testid='student-name-input' and 'add-student-btn' working.

5_join_code_copy.details: Join Code button visible on class detail page with 'Join Code: {code}' format. Copy functionality implemented (toast shows 'Join code copied!'). Note: Clipboard API requires browser permissions - works in real browser.

6_leaderboard_component.details: Leaderboard.jsx component created with RankBadge (rank 1-3 medals), LeaderboardEntry rows (player_name, score, accuracy, combo), rank-by selector (score/accuracy/time/combo). Component has data-testid='leaderboard'. However, component is NOT imported/rendered anywhere yet.

action_items: Import and render Leaderboard component in appropriate pages (e.g., Play.jsx game completion screen, class detail page, or dedicated leaderboard page)
critical_code_review_comments: Leaderboard.jsx exists but not imported in any page - component is orphaned
Play.jsx loads leaderboard data into state but doesn't render Leaderboard component
ClassDetail.jsx line 246: useEffect missing classId in dependency array (React Hook warning)

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 features working, 1 partial - Leaderboard not integrated)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Classes and ClassDetail pages fully functional. Key data-testids: classes-page, new-class-btn, create-class-btn, class-name-input, class-card-{id}, class-detail-page, add-student-dialog-btn, student-name-input, add-student-btn, student-row-{id}. Leaderboard component (leaderboard.jsx) needs to be imported and rendered somewhere - it's orphaned. Existing class join codes include 6222DD75 (4th Grade Math with 2 students).

classes_page.cards: Class cards with name, grade, subject badges, student count, join code

class_detail_page.header: Class name with badges, back button, Join Code button
